metadata.title:
WHAT TIME HAVE TO VOTE,


YELL AND SMOKE CIGARETS?" ''


SAYS ACTRESS MAY ROBSON

pages.raw_text:
May Robson, the we'll known
actress. in an interview, says that
she does not want to waste her
valuable time voting.


please write me down as OPP
posed to equal suffrage for women,
she said, "and make the opposed
as large and emphatic as you con-
veniently can. l consider my time
far too valuable to waste in political
squabbles. The Lord gave women
work that. to my mind, is far more
important than running petty polit-
ical affairs. We have all We can
do to bring up and take care of the
men. 1t is a big task and the woman
who does it right has her hands full
for this lifetime at any rate. To
rear a man and make him fair and
square. and a gentleman, is no
small achievement.


What time have I to vote, yell
and smoke cigarets? suppose you
notice l don't even put the cigaret
to my lips in the play? The wine
Why, bless you, the wine is cold
tea"
